title: Finally, Fried Egg!
description: Finally adds a fried egg, that is made by putting an egg in a furnace.
body:
![Finally, Fried Egg! Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7970ea48a1dbb3afd3e9c66607654dc53194cf2.png)
# Finally, Fried Egg!

_A simple to use datapack that allows you to put an egg in a furnace to cook it into a delectable consumable._

## Features
- You can cook this delicious meal on a campfire, smoker & furnace. 
- Can be cooked anywhere, on a log, or with a frog. 
- Rare chance for a double yolked egg! When cooking the egg it has a low chance to make two instead of one.

### Shoutout
maybejake for helping me with making this, I just make textures 🙂 Look at his amazing work [Jake's Build Tools](https://modrinth.com/datapack/jakes-build-tools)
